form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Latest effort finished 3rd in a Grade 5 on April 2 over 425m at Bendigo behind Chain Drive beaten 6 lengths (24.72). Has the ability to take this out.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Rocketed out of the boxes with a fast early split and gave a sight before being swamped late, finishing a 2 length fifth at this track over 450m in 26.02. Capable of a strong show.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Has hit the frame the last two starts, the latest when second (24.66) over 425m at Bendigo. Has a low draw. Must be included.

form.formComment: Has recorded back to back wins. Scored most recently over 425m at Bendigo in Grade 5 class eight days ago. Likely to find this too tough.

form.formComment: Has finished last in her last couple of starts, most recently at this track over 390m. Other runners look much more appealing.

form.formComment: Last start finished eighth on March 26 over 450m at this track behind Lucky Lisa, beaten 12 lengths (26.60) in a Bottom Up - Grade 5. Will need to improve to feature.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 3rd on April 2 over 425m at Bendigo behind Aunty Cheryl beaten 3 lengths (24.48) in a Grade 5. Thereabouts at the last couple. Suited here and likely to run well.

form.formComment: At the last start finished 4th in a Grade 5 on April 2 over 500m at Bendigo behind Les Norton beaten 5.5 lengths (29.29). Has ability and worth including.

form.formComment: Could only manage sixth last time but the start prior went down fighting at double figure odds when second (24.44) over 425m at Bendigo. Can measure up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Lost ground turning out of back straight.
Checked turning out of front straight and tailed off.

form.formComment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and tends to spot them a start in her races, Last start finished seventh over 450m at this track, beaten 8 lengths. Will not find this easy. Not keen.
